name: Donkey Kong Country
description: Classic platformer — collect bananas, KONG letters, and survive. Lives + bananas = score.

p1_lives.notes: Lives counter. Starts at 5, +1 per balloon/KONG. Verified live 2026-03-25.

p1_bananas.notes: Banana counter (0-99, resets at 100 = extra life). Verified live 2026-03-25 — increments +1 per banana.

levels_complete.notes: Number of levels completed this session. Verified live 2026-03-25.

tournament_modes.name: Quick Score (5 min)
tournament_modes.description: Play for 5 minutes. Score = (levels × 100) + (lives × 10) + bananas. Highest score wins.

tournament_modes.name: Timed High Score (10 min)
tournament_modes.description: Play for 10 minutes. Score = (levels_complete × 100) + (lives × 10) + bananas. Highest score wins.

tournament_modes.name: Most Levels (10 min)
tournament_modes.description: Complete as many levels as possible in 10 minutes. Lives as tiebreaker.

notes: SNES WRAM addresses verified live on Pi 5 (aarch64) with patched snes9x core
Requires snes9x with SET_MEMORY_MAPS patch for READ_CORE_MEMORY to work
Lives: 0x7E0575 (starts at 5, confirmed balloon +1, KONG letters +1)
sources: Live verification via FiberQuest RAM scanner 2026-03-25
